summary: SKILL.md correctly transforms CLAUDE.md.template into a self-contained, publicly-safe skill file. All webchat-specific sections removed, YAML frontmatter added, Deployment and Live Examples sections present. No internal infrastructure references detected.

findings.description: The Sprint Report section contains emoji characters in the original template status table (lines with emoji status indicators) that were removed in SKILL.md. The SKILL.md version correctly strips emojis from the status table while keeping the content readable.
findings.reason: Emojis were intentionally removed to keep the markdown clean for marketplace consumption.

findings.description: The localStorage/sessionStorage rule was correctly removed from the Правила section (line 239 of template referenced /api/data/ which is server-specific). The remaining rules are all infrastructure-independent.
findings.reason: Correctly follows task edge case specification.

findings.description: Item 5 from Первые шаги ('Нужен ли ввод данных сотрудниками? ... /api/data/') correctly removed per task edge case requirements.

checks.yaml_frontmatter: pass - name, description, version, tags all present
checks.removed_sections: pass - Идея, Домен, Внешние данные, Контекст дашборда, Auth, Data Storage all removed
checks.kept_sections: pass - Безопасность, Источники данных, Генерация дашбордов (all sub-sections), Первые шаги, Sprint Report all kept
checks.added_sections: pass - Deployment and Live Examples present at end
checks.forbidden_patterns: pass - 0 matches for all forbidden grep patterns
